title: landolphia dulcis
intro: Landolphia dulcis, also known as the Calabar berry or the African cherry, is a species of evergreen shrub native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The extracts from Landolphia dulcis have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and ulcers. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
